category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Python implementation for microcontrollers and constrained systems; official MicroPython docs describe MicroPython running on many systems and hardware platforms.
display_name_sources: Official homepage, docs, and GitHub organization use the capitalized name MicroPython; source_facts.name is micropython.
docs_sources: Official MicroPython documentation domain provides library, language, platform, quick reference, and tutorial documentation; official homepage links to documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/micropython/micropython; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list micropython and mpy-cross; official docs describe MicroPython on hardware platforms and the GitHub README describes Python for microcontrollers and constrained platforms.
